steps.action: Inspect renderSecondaryDetails source code in src/server.ts
steps.expected: Gas Used field is rendered for Curve quotes
steps.observed: renderSecondaryDetails uses data.gas_used for both Spandex and Curve. Shows value when present, 'N/A' when not.

steps.action: Submit compare with sender=0xd8dA6BF..., Curve shows Gas Used: N/A in details
steps.expected: Gas Used field visible in Curve details
steps.observed: Curve Details section shows 'Gas Used: N/A' confirming the field is always present

steps.action: Mock /compare response with curve.gas_used='187500' and click Compare Quotes
steps.expected: Curve quote UI shows '187500' in Gas Used field
steps.observed: Details section shows 'Gas Used: 187500' - gas value correctly displayed when available

evidence.sourceInspection:
renderSecondaryDetails renders gas_used for all quote types: `const gasUsed = data.gas_used && Number(data.gas_used) > 0 ? data.gas_used : null; details.push('
Gas Used: ' + (gasUsed || 'N/A') + '
')`
evidence.mockVerification: With gas_used='187500' injected via fetch mock, Curve Details shows 'Gas Used: 187500'
evidence.normalCase: Without gas estimation (no matching sender balance), Curve Details shows 'Gas Used: N/A'

assertions.title: Amount out and swap buttons inline with form

steps.action: Submit compare on Ethereum chain (USDC->WETH), wait for results
steps.expected: Output amount and Approve/Swap buttons visible without scrolling
steps.observed: Results section appears immediately below form. Output amount '5063.751... WETH' is visible. Approve/Swap buttons visible inline.

Result section top=547px (within viewport). Output amount visibleInViewport=true. Approve/Swap buttons visible at top=786px. Full page screenshot confirms compact inline layout with no separate scrolled results section.

evidence.layout: Form ends ~547px from top, results start immediately below with output amount and action buttons within the 818px viewport
evidence.screenshot: Full page screenshot shows complete layout: heading -> connect wallet -> form -> compare button -> auto-refresh -> tabs -> reason -> RECOMMENDED label -> big output amount -> via text -> APPROVE/SWAP buttons -> DETAILS [+]

steps.action: Inspect CSS and computed styles for all elements
steps.expected: Black/white base with one blue accent, no border-radius, max 2 fonts
steps.observed: Body: bg=white, color=black. Accent: rgb(0,85,255) = #0055FF for Compare Quotes and Swap buttons only. No border-radius found anywhere. Font families: system-ui (body), monospace (addresses). Brutalist sharp edges throughout.

evidence.colors: bg: [white, #f8f8f8, #e0e0e0, #0055FF, #fafafa, black, rgba(0,0,0,0.7)] - all grays + one blue accent
evidence.borderRadius: No border-radius found on any elements
evidence.accentUsage: Blue #0055FF used ONLY for: Compare Quotes (primary action) and Swap (primary trading action)

steps.action: Check all status indicators and recommendation labels for text labels
steps.expected: All status info conveyed via text, not just color
steps.observed: RECOMMENDED label uses text (black badge, white text). ALTERNATIVE label uses text. Tab labels 'SPANDEX' and 'CURVE'. Reason box shows textual explanation. No empty colored status badges found. Provider identification via 'Via Spandex / kyberswap' text.

steps.action: Inspect domInspection for any color-only indicators
steps.expected: No empty colored elements acting as status indicators
steps.observed: emptyColoredElements only found wallet-provider-menu and autocomplete-list (hidden dropdowns, not status indicators). No color-only status badges.

evidence.recommendLabel: RECOMMENDED text badge (class='result-recommendation winner'), bg=black, color=white
evidence.alternativeLabel: ALTERNATIVE text badge (class='result-recommendation alternative') - also text-based
evidence.reasonBox: Text description: 'Spandex (kyberswap) outputs 887.239636 WETH more (+21.244%). Gas estimates unavailable for Curve...'
evidence.noColorOnlyIndicators: Zero empty colored elements found acting as status indicators

steps.expected: /*.png in .gitignore prevents root PNG files from being committed
steps.observed: .gitignore contains '/*.png' with comment 'Validation screenshots in repo root (PNGs in subdirectories may be intentional)'

steps.action: Run git ls-files '*.png' to check tracked PNG files
steps.expected: No PNG files tracked in repo root
steps.observed: git ls-files shows PNGs only in .factory/validation/swap-ux/... and docs/screenshot.png. No root PNG files tracked.

steps.action: Check git log for implementation commit
steps.observed: Commit cc3bded 'Clean up validation screenshots from repo root and add gitignore rule' added /*.png to .gitignore. Commit explicitly notes 'Fulfills: VAL-CROSS-008'.

evidence.gitLsFiles: No PNG files in repo root are tracked by git
evidence.implementationCommit: cc3bded explicitly fulfills VAL-CROSS-008 by adding gitignore rule

frictions: Curve gas estimation fails when sender doesn't hold tokens - requires a funded account to test live gas estimates. Mock injection was needed to verify the UI behavior.
